mapper.select: SELECT a.* FROM xm_answer_report_item a LEFT JOIN xm_course_question b ON a.question_id = b.id WHERE a.report_id = #{reportId} ORDER BY b.question_type, a.question_id

SELECT a.question_id, a.answer_time, a.my_answers, a.answer_type, b.question_name, b.question_type, b.answerA, b.answerB, b.answerC, b.answerD, b.answerE, b.answerF, b.answer_parse, b.right_answers FROM xm_answer_report_item a LEFT JOIN xm_course_question b ON a.question_id = b.id WHERE a.report_id = #{reportId}
AND a.answer_type = #{answerType}

SELECT w.my_answers FROM ( SELECT COUNT(1), i.my_answers FROM xm_answer_report_item i WHERE i.question_id = #{questionId} AND i.answer_type = 2 GROUP BY i.my_answers ORDER BY COUNT(1) DESC LIMIT 1 ) w

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(i.answer_time), 0) FROM xm_answer_report r LEFT JOIN xm_answer_report_item i ON r.id = i.report_id WHERE r.person_id = #{personId} AND i.question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
